_doc: Internal Rust regression — not a published ICSBEP case. The canonical PWR pin cell built into `pwr_pincell` is morally an LCT-007-style geometry (3.1 % UO₂, 1.26 cm pitch, reflective xy, reflective z → k_inf), but the binary's hard-coded composition doesn't match any specific LCT card. Tracked here as an `INTERNAL` suite case so the bench harness exercises the kinf-flavoured output parser and catches regressions in pwr_pincell.rs without falsely advertising as ICSBEP coverage. Replace with real LCT-001..050 entries once `Geometry::from_json` lands or `pwr_pincell` is parameterised on enrichment/pitch.

benchmark.case_name: PWR pin cell, 3.1 % UO₂, 1.26 cm pitch (k_inf)
benchmark.source: Internal Rust regression — value pinned to the resume.md `[pwr]` 80 b × 5 k × 5 seeds baseline, sigma reflects current within-engine seed-to-seed scatter, not σ_exp.
